subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath sent down His grace and revealed unto all creation that which lay hidden within His revealed Books [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل النعمه و اظهر للبریه ما کان مستورا فی کتبه المنزله التی
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @praise and encouragement, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
